ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "status" TEXT /* Project status (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Project budget */,
  "description" TEXT /* Project description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rooms" (
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the room belongs to */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Email of the user who created the room */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date and time the room was created */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the room */,
  "floor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the floor the room is on */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the room */,
  "external_system" TEXT /* External system used for room design (e.g., Autodesk Revit) */,
  "external_object" TEXT /* Type of external object (e.g., Rooms) */,
  "external_identifier" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the room in the external system */,
  "room_tag" TEXT /* Tag for room classification */,
  "usable_height" INTEGER /* Usable height of the room in millimeters */,
  "gross_area" REAL /* Gross area of the room in square meters */,
  "net_area" REAL /* Net area of the room in square meters */,
  "occupancy" INTEGER /* Maximum occupancy of the room */,
  "lighting_type" TEXT /* Type of lighting used in the room */,
  "heating_type" TEXT /* Type of heating used in the room */,
  "cooling_type" TEXT /* Type of cooling used in the room */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rooms_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rooms_floor_id FOREIGN KEY ("floor_id") REFERENCES floors ("floor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rooms_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("email"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rooms_room_tag FOREIGN KEY ("room_tag") REFERENCES room_tags ("tag_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rooms_external_system FOREIGN KEY ("external_system") REFERENCES external_systems ("system_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rooms_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rooms_external_object FOREIGN KEY ("external_object") REFERENCES external_objects ("object_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., architect, engineer, project manager) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "floors" (
  "floor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each floor */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the floor belongs to */,
  "floor_name" TEXT /* Name of the floor */,
  "floor_level" INTEGER /* Level of the floor in the building */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("floor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the external system */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the external system */,
  "build" TEXT /* Build information of the external system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external object type */,
  "object_name" TEXT /* Name of the external object type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the external object type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "room_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the room tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the room tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* ID of the room being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the room */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the room was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_room_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_id") REFERENCES rooms ("room_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_history" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* ID of the room the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the version change */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_room_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_id") REFERENCES rooms ("room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_members" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the document belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the document file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the document file (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the document file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_documents_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_meetings" (
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the meeting belongs to */,
  "meeting_date" TEXT /* Date of the meeting */,
  "meeting_time" TEXT /* Time of the meeting */,
  "agenda" TEXT /* Agenda of the meeting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_meetings_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
